3-zone universal transmitter. Converts wired sensors to 345MHz wireless. 500ft range.
Wireless shock sensor. Detects vibrations on windows/doors.
Outdoor PIR motion. Dual-element. IP54 weatherproof. 40ft range. Pet immune.

Current wireless CO detector. Electrochemical sensor. Replaces 5800CO.
Combo smoke/CO/heat/IR detector. 4 sensing elements. Photo-electric + electrochemical CO + IR flame + thermal.
Heat-only detector. Fixed temp (135F) + rate-of-rise (15F/min). UL 521. Commercial/residential.
Asset protection/tilt sensor. MEMS accelerometer. Detects movement or 30-degree tilt. For paintings, safes.
Bi-directional 4-button keyfob. Sends AND receives signals. LED status feedback.
SiX mini door/window contact. Replaced by PROSIXMINI3.

Garage door tilt sensor. 45-degree trigger. Slow loop response prevents wind false alarms. Still manufactured by Ecolink.
Flood + freeze sensor. Dual zones (flood + freeze). Gold-plated contacts. Detects 1/64-inch water. Freeze at 41F. CR123A, 10yr. Still manufactured by Ecolink.
4-button chrome keyfob. Crystal-based. Arm/disarm/panic.
2-button keyfob. Simple arm/disarm. Crystal-based.
Universal transmitter. Converts wired sensors to 319.5MHz wireless. Crystal-based.

Wireless CO alarm. For Simon/Concord panels.

4-button micro keyfob. Compact design. Crystal-based.

Personal panic device. White and black variants.
Wireless interconnected photoelectric smoke + heat + freeze. 10-year sealed battery. Up to 24 interconnected units.
